{{# Mister Chameleon — Adaptive Slot (client-side / snippet edition) --------------------------------------------------------------- Renders ONE context_slot block on a standalone Statamic frontend. How it works: 1. The CMS-authored fields (heading / body / cta ...) render SERVER-SIDE as the fallback. Bots, no-JS visitors, and requests made while the platform is unavailable see this content — so it is fully SEO-safe. 2. Each swappable element carries a `data-mc-slot=""` marker. The Mister Chameleon snippet (mc_snippet.antlers.html, loaded in ) calls /api/snippet/decide and replaces the text/href of these elements per visitor. The data-mc-slot keys below MUST match the platform's decision contract: hero → hero-tag, hero-title, hero-subtitle, hero-cta-label, hero-cta-href proof → proof-title cta → cta-title, cta-text, cta-cta-label, cta-cta-href feature → feature-title, feature-subtitle conversion → conversion-title, conversion-text, conversion-cta-label, conversion-cta-href notification→ notification-message, notification-cta-label, notification-cta-href Note: the client-side snippet swaps by slot TYPE, so use at most one slot of each type per page. For richer, per-instance server-side personalisation use the PHP-tag edition of the add-on. #}}
{{ if slot_type == 'notification' }}
{{ if message }}{{ message }}{{ /if }} {{ if cta_label }}{{ cta_label }}{{ /if }}
{{ else }} {{ if slot_type == 'hero' and tag }}

{{ tag }}

{{ /if }} {{ if heading }}

{{ heading }}

{{ /if }} {{ if body }} {{# proof has no body slot key on the platform → render static (no swap marker). #}} {{ if slot_type == 'proof' }}

{{ body | nl2br }}

{{ else }}

{{ body | nl2br }}

{{ /if }} {{ /if }} {{# Media is a static fallback: the platform personalises copy, not images, client-side. #}} {{ if media }} {{ media }}{{ /media }} {{ /if }} {{# Only hero / cta / conversion carry a CTA slot key. #}} {{ if cta_label and (slot_type == 'hero' or slot_type == 'cta' or slot_type == 'conversion') }} {{ cta_label }} {{ /if }} {{ /if }}
